title: sericocalyx timorensis
intro: Sericocalyx timorensis, also known as Timor sericocalyx, is a plant species endemic to East Timor. It belongs to the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the mint family. The medicinal properties of Sericocalyx timorensis have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting overall well-being.
